$comment: scripts/SSAnneCaptainsRoom.asm — the seasick captain, FULLY AUTHORED (wave C): the back rub with the healing-machine cue and a 42-frame beat, then HM01 (give_item's full-bag abort leaves GOT_HM01 unset so he re-offers); recovered, he just muses.

then.text:
CAPTAIN: Whew! Now that I'm not
sick any more, I
guess it's time.

else.text:
CAPTAIN: Ooargh...
I feel hideous...
Urrp! Seasick... {player} rubbed
the CAPTAIN's
back! Rub-rub...
Rub-rub...

CAPTAIN: Whew!
Thank you! I
feel much better! You want to see
my CUT technique? I could show you
if I wasn't ill... I know! You can
have this! Teach it to your
POKéMON and you
can see it CUT
any time!
